title: Bed Benefits [Fork]
description: Adds some additional benefits to sleeping. Fork of old mod by Darkhax for newer version.
body:
This mod provides some additional benefits to sleeping.

This is a fork of the old mod Bed Benefits by [Darkhax](https://modrinth.com/user/Darkhax) for the newer version of Minecraft (1.21.1+).


## Features

### Sleeping Heals Damage
Sleeping in a bed will heal the player by a configurable amount.

### Potion Effects Reset
Sleeping will cure negative(default: true) and positive(default:false) potion effects. Each type can be disabled separately in the config file.
